---
title: "Data Cleansing"
---

# Data Cleansing Experience

## Flight Delays Project
**Data Wrangling:** Cleaned a messy JSON dataset of airport flight delays. Standardized various missing data types (e.g., `-999`, `"n/a"`, empty strings, and `"1500+"`) into consistent `np.nan` values for accurate analysis.

## Star Wars Survey Project
**Data Validation:** Cleaned extremely messy survey data from FiveThirtyEight. Validated the dataset by successfully recreating three of the original article's charts (Movies Seen, Best Movie, Who Shot First).

**Data Preparation:** Transformed text-heavy survey responses into machine-learning-ready numeric data using categorical mapping, label encoding, and one-hot encoding. Dynamically handled missing survey responses using median imputation.
